title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Lead engineer on the streaming-ingest pipeline, on call rotation, and platform-team mentor.
highlights: Cut p99 ingest latency by 42% by rewriting the hot path in Rust-backed workers
Designed an at-least-once retry protocol that survived an upstream Kafka outage with zero data loss
Mentored four junior engineers; two promoted within 18 months

title: Software Engineer
summary: Full-stack engineer on the alerting and dashboards team.
highlights: Shipped the v2 dashboard editor used by 80% of paying customers
Owned weekly release train across three product teams

title: Software Lead, Internal Tools
summary: Built and maintained reservation, point-of-sale, and back-of-house tooling for a regional hotel and venue network.
highlights: Replaced a vendor PMS with an in-house Next.js app, saving $180k/yr in license fees
Stood up the team's first CI/CD pipeline; cut release time from two weeks to two hours

title: Production Manager, Venue Events
summary: Ran production for in-house corporate and private events across three Northgate venues while continuing software work.
highlights: Produced 60+ events per year ranging from 50 to 1,200 guests
Built the run-of-show template library now used across all Northgate venues

title: Lead Producer
summary: Lead producer on flagship festivals, corporate galas, and brand activations.

Owns the vendor roster and the production-budget model used company-wide
On-site lead for cross-functional crews of 30+ on multi-day builds
